title: ADCS ESC8: NTLM Relay to Certificate Web Enrollment
description: Detects ESC8 attacks relaying coerced NTLM authentication to the ADCS HTTP web-enrollment endpoint (certsrv) to obtain a certificate for a DC or privileged account. Indicators include Certipy 'relay' mode and ntlmrelayx targeting /certsrv/certfnsh.asp. In GOAD this is chained with PetitPotam.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*certipy relay*' or 'Command Line' like '*-target http*' or 'Command Line' like '*certsrv*' or 'Command Line' like '*certfnsh.asp*' or 'Command Line' like '*CertificateWebEnrollment*' or 'Command Line' like '*-template DomainController*')))
